query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: AAP Convener Arvind Kejriwal urges Centre to offer E20, E10 and E0 fuel options at petrol pumps
articles.description: Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) National Convenor Arvind Kejriwal on Tuesday urged the Centre to provide consumers with the option of choosing between different fuel blends, including E20, E10 and E0, alleging that the government was trying to push E20 fuel despite public opposition.

articles.title: Will Govt Delay E25 Petrol Rollout? Here's Why Centre Is Reassessing Its Push for Ethanol Blending
articles.description: Is India delaying E25 petrol? Here's why the government may slow the rollout amid mileage concerns, older vehicle compatibility issues and ethanol blending challenges.

articles.title: Explained - CNBC TV18
articles.description: The competition in the energy market has intensified forcing Saudi Arabia to offer its Asian customers the biggest cut to oil prices in 26 years.

articles.title: Trump courts voters with investment accounts for kids and lower petrol, grocery prices
articles.description: Democrats call the plan a distraction from healthcare and food stamp cuts that could worsen inequality. Read more at straitstimes.com.

articles.title: Government denies reports of E25 petrol rollout, says no decision taken yet
articles.description: Government sources have denied reports of an E25 rollout and said no decision has been taken yet. They said E-20 has been in safe use after testing and any further move will depend on scientific findings.

articles.title: The likely loser in Gulf's post-war race for oil market share
articles.description: United Arab Emirates is leading oil producers in a fierce market share battle. Saudi Arabia and other Gulf nations are increasing exports significantly. Exporters are offering steep discounts to attract buyers for their surplus crude. This aggressive push has weakened oil prices and challenged OPEC's authority.

articles.title: Govt Rejects E25 Rollout Claims, Says E20 Petrol Safe for 2.5 Years; Blames 'International Conspiracy'
articles.description: Officials reject claims that a higher E25 blend has been scheduled, and call the panic around ethanol an "international conspiracy", India News, Times Now

articles.title: Sensex, Nifty Open Higher as FII Buying and Softer Crude Lift Markets
articles.description: Benchmark indices gain in early trade as easing West Asia tensions bring oil prices back to pre-war levels and foreign investors turn buyers.

articles.title: Global Market: Euro zone inflation risks persist despite oil price retreat, ECB's Schnabel warns
articles.description: ECB Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel said the euro zone economy has not returned to pre-war conditions despite lower oil prices, citing persistent core inflation, energy market risks and supply chain pressures. Her remarks suggest policymakers remain cautious on inflation, while another ECB official struck a more optimistic tone on energy prices.

articles.title: OPEC is likely loser in Gulf’s post-war race for market share
articles.description: The United Arab Emirates has fired the opening shot in what is fast becoming a fierce battle among Middle East oil producers to reclaim market share after the Iran war, a contest that threatens to weaken oil prices and further erode OPEC's authority.
